title: Challenge 1
goal: Reduce this 5 line program to just 2 lines.
startingCode:
print("Hello World")
print("Hello World")
print("Hello World")
print("Hello World")
print("Hello World")
solutionDesc: Use a for loop instead of repeating the code!
solutionCode:
for i in range(5):
    print("Hello World")

title: Challenge 2
goal: You don't need to reduce the number of lines in this code but do you notice the mistake?
solutionDesc: If `coins >= 50` is false then coins must be less than 50. So no need for an else if, just use a regular else statement.

title: Challenge 3
goal: Reduce this 5 line program to just 3 lines.
startingCode:
numbers = [5, 10, 15, 20]
total = 0
for num in numbers:
    total = total + num
print(total)
solutionDesc: Python has built-in functions that do the heavy lifting for you. Use `sum()` here.
